subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth! Verily they are manifest proofs unto them that dwell in the heavens and on earth. Blessed is he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق انها لبینات لمن فی السموات و الارضین طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
